name: Country Style Turkey Sausage
recipeIngredient: Half pound Lean ground turkey breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a cold 10 inch skillet with nonstick coating.
2. Set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the egg white, onion, dried or fresh apples, quick-cooking oats, parsley, salt, sage, nutmeg, pepper and ground red pepper.
4. Add the ground turkey; mix well.
5. Shape mixture into eight 2-inch wide patties.
6. Preheat the prepared skillet over medium heat.
7. Place patties in skillet.
8. Cook over medium heat for 10-12 minutes or until meat is no longer pink and juices run clear, turning once.
9. Drain off fat.
